summary: PASS. The exact two-lane manifest is self-contained, disjoint, least-privilege, one-retry compatible, and executable-check governed. The Judge independently reproduced the declared semantic contract hash and confirmed that exported patches cannot collide or disappear with the worktrees.
requirement_gaps: Lane-local checks cannot by themselves judge the quality of worker-authored tests or prose; the integrated full suite, fresh semantic Judge, and canary remain mandatory downstream gates.
The implementation should lint missing or placeholder harness attestation as well as reviewer model/family/runtime so a fabricated review block cannot satisfy a high-risk gate.
required_changes: Replace the exact-manifest review placeholder with this harness session ID before dispatch.
Persist this review receipt at the manifest's referenced artifact path before dispatch.
advisories: Keep the post-integration full-suite, semantic-review, and canary gates distinct.
Confirm the two exported patches apply cleanly before any deployment.
Keep the hard-coded Aegis orchestration paths host-scoped when deriving future templates.
